assumptions: The question concerns consolidated financial statements.
The declared intragroup dividend has resulted in recognition of an intragroup monetary receivable/payable.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: A recognised foreign-currency monetary receivable is a hedged-item candidate within IFRS 9 hedge accounting, subject to the specific consolidated intragroup exception for monetary items.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IAS 21 and IFRIC 16 identify a distinct hedge accounting model for foreign currency exposures linked to a net investment in a foreign operation, which is the other relevant IFRS hedge model for intragroup foreign-currency monetary positions in consolidation.
